title: Insurance Policy API
description: Production-style RESTful API for full lifecycle management of insurance policies across 10+ endpoints with layered MVC architecture.
modalSubtitle: Java · Spring Boot · Maven · REST API · April 2026
overview: A production-style RESTful API built with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.2 for full lifecycle management of insurance policies. Covers Auto, Home, Health, Life, and Business policy types across 10+ endpoints, following industry-standard layered architecture patterns.

sections.heading: What I Built
bullets: Designed 10+ RESTful endpoints supporting full CRUD operations with proper HTTP status codes and REST best practices
Applied layered MVC architecture (Controller → Service → Repository) using Spring Data JPA, constructor-based dependency injection, and @Transactional service methods for data consistency
Designed centralized exception handling via @ControllerAdvice with custom exceptions (PolicyNotFoundException, DuplicatePolicyException) for clean, consistent error responses
Enforced input validation using Bean Validation (@Valid, @NotNull) and integrated OpenAPI/Swagger UI via SpringDoc for interactive API documentation
